violations.text: Employees were observed actively eating in food preparation area. Employees shall not eat drink from open food or beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025

The door to the outside, located by the loading dock, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2025
Internal area of ice machine near discharge chute was observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026
